subs.text: The full set is waiting for you. Link in bio — come find me there.
POV: you finally checked the link and now you can't stop scrolling. Link in bio.
New month, new content. Link in bio if you're not already subscribed.
Appreciate all the kind words. A lot more where this came from — link in my profile.
Everything you see here? The unfiltered version lives behind the link in bio.
The comment section asked and I delivered — link in bio to see the rest.
Everything you've been requesting is waiting in the link. Go.
Happy to keep posting here — there's a lot more behind the link in my profile if you're interested.
If you like what you see here, you'll love what's behind the link in bio.
This is the SFW version. The link in bio version is... different.
I'm not holding back anymore. Link in bio.
For those who asked — yes, there's a full gallery. Link in my profile bio.
My most exclusive content never touches this page. Find it in the link in bio.
Don't say I didn't warn you. Link in bio while it's still up.
Not posting the rest here. You know where to find me. Link in bio.
Wanted to share a preview here. Full set is live — linked in my profile.
One tap. All access. Link in bio.
Most requested content this week is behind the link in bio. You asked, I posted.
Drop a reply if you want more of this. And while you're here — link in bio.
Thanks for the upvotes — plenty more if you're interested. Link in my profile.

ppv.text: Dropped something special today. DM me 'PPV' if you want in.
This never goes on the main page. DM 'PPV' if you want the link.
New PPV just dropped. DM 'PPV' for the link — first to ask get priority.
Posting this here first — there's an exclusive set available this week. DM me for details.
This one's locked and it's worth it. DM 'UNLOCK' to grab yours.
The video I almost didn't post is in the DMs right now. You know what to do.
Just posted a new PPV. DM me if you want it — limited time at this price.
For anyone who's been following for a while — there's a one-time premium release available. DM me.
Limited run — only a few copies going out. DM me to get yours before it's gone.
It's giving exclusive. It's giving limited. DM me 'YES' and find out what's waiting.
This one won't be free. DM 'GET' and I'll send you the details right away.
Limited availability this week only. DM me if you'd like details on the PPV.
My most requested set just went live as a PPV. Slide into my DMs to grab it.
Only sending this to people who actually reach out. DM 'OPEN' to get it.
Exclusive drop, limited time. DM to claim yours before it closes.
Not posting this publicly. DM me 'PPV' and I'll share the details directly.
This week's exclusive drop is out. DM me if you want early access.
POV: you DM'd for access and got it immediately. Go try it — DM 'PPV'.
Posted something I won't put on the main feed. DM 'PPV' to see it.
There's a new exclusive drop available for this week only. Reach out if you're interested.

customs.text: Taking a limited number of custom requests this week. DM me what you have in mind.
Custom requests are open — DM me your idea before the slots fill up.
Custom order slots are open. DM 'CUSTOM' with your request. Limited spots available.
Opening up a few custom content slots this week. DM me if you'd like to discuss.
Custom slots just opened. Tell me your idea and I'll make it happen. DM to book.
Just opened up a few custom slots. Got something specific in mind? My DMs are open.
Taking custom requests this week. If you have something specific in mind, slide in my DMs.
For those who've asked about custom requests — I have a few openings this week.
A few spots opened for custom content. DM me with your request before they're gone.
Someone asked if I take custom requests. Yes. DM 'CUSTOM' and let's talk.
DM 'CUSTOM' if you want something made just for you. A few slots left this week.
Available for custom work this week. DM me with what you have in mind.
If you've ever wanted something made just for you — this week's the week. DM me.
Custom content is my favourite to make. Limited slots this week — DM to claim yours.
Custom content week is back. DM me your request before they're gone.
Taking limited custom orders — if you've had something in mind, now's a good time to reach out.
Two custom slots left this week. First DMs get priority — tell me what you want.
Your idea, my creation. DM me what you're thinking before the spots are gone.
New batch of custom slots just opened. You know the drill — DM me.
A few custom slots opened up. Message me if you're interested in getting something made.
